title: Mateusz Gajewski
text:
Google Scholar
  
  
    
     LinkedIn
  
  
    
     E-mail
  

  
  
Hi! I’m Mateusz Gajewski, a PhD student at Poznan University of Technology and AKCES NCBR. My research focuses on causal discovery — I’m particularly interested in developing scalable, flexible, data-efficient, and robust methods that leverage deep learning (e.g. foundation models), as well as understanding the fundamental limitations of causal discovery algorithms.
I’m also interested in explainability of machine learning models, especially through the lens of game theory, and in the interplay between causality and explainability.
